children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Except as provided in regulations prescribed by the Secretary, it shall be unlawful for a dealer to purchase distilled spirits for resale from any person other than a wholesale dealer in liquors who is required to keep the records prescribed by section 5121.

children.heading: Limited retail dealers
children.label: b Limited retail dealers
children.text: A limited retail dealer may lawfully purchase distilled spirits for resale from a retail dealer in liquors.

children.heading: Penalty and forfeiture
children.label: c Penalty and forfeiture
children.text: For penalty and forfeiture provisions applicable to violations of subsection (a), see sections 5687 and 7302.
